scene1_hook: Your skin deserves more than a promise.
scene2_problem: Most serums are packed with fillers, artificial fragrance, and empty claims. Your skin absorbs everything — so what goes in matters.

scene2_overlays.text: No fillers. No fragrance. No shortcuts.

scene3_stakes: Dull skin, dark spots, and uneven tone don't have to be permanent. The right ingredients — at the right concentration — actually work.
scene4_solution: LumaGlow Vitamin C Serum delivers 20% pure L-Ascorbic Acid directly to your skin — brightening, firming, and fading spots in as little as one week. Clinically tested. Clean formula.

scene4_overlays.text: 20% Vitamin C  |  Clinically Tested  |  Clean Formula

scene5_ask: Try LumaGlow risk-free for 30 days. If your skin doesn't glow, you pay nothing. Order now at LumaGlow.com.

lines: AI Video Production by Doug Morse
